NAVAREA XIX 125/21
 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT　 271830 UTC SEP 21
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 72-27.3N 020-08.9E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 71-31.3N 022-44.4E SCARABEO 8
 66-14.0N 008-19.8E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　123/21
